PM-KISAN.eligibility: Small and marginal farmer families with combined land holding upto 2 hectares, subject to certain exclusion criteria for higher income groups
PM-KISAN.benefit: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each
PM-KISAN.how_to_apply: Through Common Service Centers (CSCs), state government officials, or online at pmkisan.gov.in

Jan_Dhan.eligibility: Indian citizen (minor can have joint account with guardian), age 10 years and above
Jan_Dhan.benefit: Zero balance bank account, RuPay debit card, ₹2 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life insurance, overdraft facility up to ₹10,000
Jan_Dhan.how_to_apply: Visit any bank branch with identity and address proof (Aadhaar sufficient for opening account)

Atal_Pension_Yojana.eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-40 years, not income tax payers
Atal_Pension_Yojana.benefit: Guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000/- or ₹2,000/- or ₹3,000/- or ₹4,000 or ₹5,000 per month at age 60
Atal_Pension_Yojana.how_to_apply: Through banks or post offices where you have savings account, or online via APY portal

Sukanya_Samriddhi.eligibility: Girl child below 10 years of age, Indian citizen
Sukanya_Samriddhi.benefit: Attractive interest rate (currently 7.6% compounded annually), tax benefits under Section 80C
Sukanya_Samriddhi.how_to_apply: Through authorized banks and India Post offices with girl's birth certificate and parent/guardian ID proof

PM_Suraksha_Bima.eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-70 years with bank account
PM_Suraksha_Bima.benefit: ₹2 lakh for accidental death and full disability, ₹1 lakh for partial disability
PM_Suraksha_Bima.how_to_apply: Through auto-debit from bank account (₹12 per year premium), available at all banks
